aternosguardian.help.title: Aternos Heap Guardian — commands:
aternosguardian.help.entry.status: /aternosguardian status — Current tier and heap percentage.
aternosguardian.help.entry.metrics: /aternosguardian metrics — Heap, tier, players, loaded chunks, view distance.
aternosguardian.help.entry.env: /aternosguardian env — JVM heap/CPU snapshot from server start (RAM Boost detection).
aternosguardian.help.entry.lagspikes: /aternosguardian lagspikes — Recent ticks over 100 ms with the heap state at the time.
aternosguardian.help.entry.topentities: /aternosguardian top entities — Top 10 entity types by count, with dimension breakdown.
aternosguardian.help.entry.inspect: /aternosguardian inspect chunks — Per-dimension loaded / forced / player counts.
aternosguardian.help.entry.prune: /aternosguardian prune — Identify unreachable loaded chunks (anchored flood-fill).
aternosguardian.help.entry.storage: /aternosguardian storage — World directory size vs the Aternos 4GB cap.
aternosguardian.tuning.title: Heap Guardian AutoTuner:
aternosguardian.prune.result: Chunk prune: %s isolated chunks identified. Vanilla will unload them within ~10 ticks.
aternosguardian.storage.error: Could not read world directory size.
aternosguardian.idle.first_join: Welcome — Aternos idle timer reset for as long as you stay online.
